catan: Build roads, trade resources, and settle an island — every roll of the dice could change your fortune.
ticket-to-ride: Claim railway routes across the map and connect distant cities — simple to learn, endlessly satisfying.
wingspan: Attract beautiful birds to your wildlife preserve — a peaceful engine-builder with stunning art.
pandemic: Save humanity by working together to cure deadly diseases — cooperation is your only hope.
spirit-island: Play as powerful spirits defending your island from colonial invaders — asymmetric strategy at its finest.
azul: Draft colorful tiles to decorate the royal palace — elegantly simple with deliciously tough decisions.
splendor: Collect gems and build a renaissance merchant empire — quick turns, deep strategy.
carcassonne: Build a medieval landscape tile by tile — claim roads, cities, and monasteries for points.
dominion: Build the best deck of cards to dominate the kingdom — the game that launched a genre.
root: An asymmetric woodland war where cats, birds, and vagabonds fight for control — no two factions play alike.
scythe: Lead your faction in an alternate-history 1920s Europa — mechs, farming, and engine-building collide.
king-of-tokyo: Mutant monsters battle for supremacy in Tokyo — roll dice, gain powers, and smash your rivals.
coup: Bluff, scheme, and overthrow your opponents in a dystopian future — only the cunning survive.
love-letter: Win the princess's heart with deduction and a little luck — packed in just 16 cards.
codenames: Give one-word clues to help your team identify secret agents — a battle of wits and wordplay.
seven-wonders: Lead an ancient civilization to glory through three ages — draft cards, build wonders, dominate history.
terraforming-mars: Transform the red planet into a habitable world — manage resources and compete for glory.
everdell: Build a charming woodland city with critters and constructions — adorable theme meets satisfying combos.
betrayal-at-house-on-the-hill: Explore a haunted mansion where one player becomes the traitor — every game tells a different horror story.
lords-of-waterdeep: Recruit adventurers and complete quests in the City of Splendors — worker placement with a D&D twist.
cosmic-encounter: Negotiate, betray, and conquer planets with wild alien powers — chaos and diplomacy in space.
clank: Sneak into a dragon's lair to steal treasure without making too much noise — deck-building meets dungeon-crawling.
quacks-of-quedlinburg: Brew potions by pulling ingredients from your bag — press your luck or play it safe.
power-grid: Buy power plants and fuel cities across the network — auction, manage resources, and electrify the map.
villainous: Play as a classic Disney villain pursuing your own evil scheme — asymmetric goals and delightful theme.
brass-birmingham: Build an industrial empire in England's Industrial Revolution — deep economic strategy with beautiful components.
sagrada: Craft a stunning stained-glass window with dice — a colorful puzzle with tricky restrictions.
dixit: Tell cryptic clues for your beautifully illustrated cards — imagination and interpretation win the day.
sushi-go-party: Draft adorable sushi dishes for the best meal — fast, fun, and full of variety.
agricola: Build a thriving medieval farm from scratch — feed your family and don't let anything go to waste.
concordia: Expand your trade network across ancient Rome — elegant card play meets economic strategy.
great-western-trail: Drive your cattle herd to Kansas City — deck-building on the American frontier.
castles-of-burgundy: Build the best princedom in medieval France — roll dice, place tiles, and optimize everything.
patchwork: Stitch together the coziest quilt — a perfect two-player puzzle of Tetris-style tiles.
photosynthesis: Grow majestic trees and harvest light in a living forest — beautiful 3D gameplay meets tactical positioning.
kingdomino: Build the best kingdom by drafting domino-style terrain tiles — quick, satisfying, and family-friendly.
skull: Bluff your friends with flowers and skulls — the simplest, tensest game you'll ever play.
one-night-ultimate-werewolf: Deduce who the werewolves are in just one night — fast-paced social deduction with no elimination.
decrypto: Intercept the other team's secret codes without revealing your own — clever wordplay meets espionage.
wavelength: Guess where your teammate's clue falls on a hidden spectrum — hilarious debates guaranteed.
the-crew: Work together to complete trick-taking missions in space — cooperative card play with rising challenges.
mysterium: A ghost gives cryptic visions to psychics solving a murder — cooperative deduction with dreamlike art.
just-one: Give one-word clues to help your teammate guess the secret word — but duplicate clues are eliminated.
takenoko: Tend a bamboo garden while satisfying a hungry panda — cute theme meets tactical tile-laying.
century-spice-road: Trade spices along merchant routes to fulfill orders — silky-smooth engine-building in 30 minutes.
telestrations: Draw and guess in a hilarious game of telephone — the results are always ridiculous.
dead-of-winter: Survive a zombie apocalypse while pursuing secret objectives — someone might be a traitor.
sheriff-of-nottingham: Smuggle goods past the sheriff or play it honest — bluffing, bribes, and negotiation.
above-and-below: Build a village and explore the caverns below — storytelling meets engine-building.
viticulture: Plant vines, harvest grapes, and craft fine wine — a delightful worker placement with a Tuscany vineyard theme.
cant-stop: Push your luck climbing numbered columns — one more roll could win it all or lose everything.
jaipur: Outwit your rival in a fast-paced market duel of camels, gems, and strategic trading.
seven-wonders-duel: Draft ancient wonders and outmaneuver your opponent in this perfect two-player civilization clash.
santorini: Build towers and invoke god powers in this beautiful abstract game of divine strategy.
forbidden-island: Race against rising tides to collect treasures before your island sanctuary sinks forever.
forbidden-desert: Survive scorching heat and shifting sands to uncover an ancient flying machine’s lost parts.
camel-up: Bet on stacked racing camels in the wackiest, most unpredictable desert derby ever.
sequence: Connect five chips in a row using cards and cunning — simple to learn, endlessly strategic.
blokus: Claim territory with colorful pieces that must touch corners — elegant spatial puzzle warfare.
unstable-unicorns: Backstab your friends while building a magical unicorn army in this chaotic card game.
exploding-kittens: Defuse bombs and dodge disasters in a lightning-fast game of feline Russian roulette.
machi-koro: Roll dice to develop your city’s economy — will you build bakeries or broadcast towers?
tokaido: Journey along a scenic Japanese road, collecting experiences in the most beautiful trip of your life.
istanbul: Navigate a bustling bazaar with your merchant and assistants to collect precious rubies first.
five-tribes: Manipulate colorful meeples across a desert marketplace in this brain-burning tactical puzzle.
alhambra: Construct the most magnificent palace complex using clever tile placement and currency management.
karuba: Race to guide your explorers through dense jungle paths to discover hidden temple treasures.
kingsburg: Influence advisors, gather resources, and defend your province from invading hordes each year.
stone-age: Feed your tribe, gather resources, and advance civilization from humble beginnings to prosperity.
raiders-of-the-north-sea: Assemble a Viking crew, raid settlements, and claim glory in this worker-placement adventure.
architects-of-the-west-kingdom: Build the kingdom’s greatest structures while navigating corruption, taxes, and rival architects.
paladins-of-the-west-kingdom: Recruit townsfolk, go on quests, and battle to prove your devotion to the realm.
champions-of-midgard: Lead Viking warriors and mythical creatures against trolls, draugr, and fearsome monsters.
clank-in-space: Steal artifacts from an alien overlord’s spaceship — but make too much noise and perish.
mysterium-park: A ghost sends cryptic visions to psychics investigating a mysterious carnival tragedy.
horrified: Unite to battle classic Universal Monsters — Dracula, the Mummy, and more threaten the town.
unmatched: Duel with iconic heroes from history and fiction in asymmetric tactical combat.
dice-throne: Roll dice, unleash abilities, and battle opponents in this fast-paced combat game.
star-realms: Build a space fleet and blast your opponent’s authority to zero in this deckbuilding battle.
hero-realms: Fantasy deckbuilding combat where you recruit champions and cast spells to defeat rivals.
res-arcana: Master eight essences of magic to claim ancient monuments and power in this tight engine game.
race-for-the-galaxy: Build a galactic civilization through cards — explore, develop, settle, trade, and conquer.
roll-for-the-galaxy: Use dice workers to expand your space empire in this fast and colorful cosmic puzzle.
pandemic-legacy-season-1: Save humanity from disease in a year-long campaign where every choice permanently changes the game.
gloomhaven-jaws-of-the-lion: Tactical mercenary adventures with evolving characters — dungeon crawling without the dungeon master.
mice-and-mystics: Brave mice battle cats and rats in a storybook adventure to save the kingdom.
descent-legends-of-the-dark: Epic fantasy quests powered by an app that controls enemies and tells branching stories.
mansions-of-madness: Investigate eldritch mysteries in a fully narrated horror adventure where madness lurks everywhere.
arkham-horror-card-game: Build investigator decks and unravel cosmic conspiracies in this narrative card adventure.
marvel-champions: Become iconic Marvel heroes and thwart villainous schemes in cooperative deckbuilding battles.
keyforge: Every deck is unique — master the cards you’re dealt in this innovative combat game.
aeons-end: Mages cooperate to defend the last city from interdimensional Nameless horrors using spell combos.
tiny-towns: Draft resources to build the cutest town — limited space means every placement matters hugely.
calico: Sew a cozy quilt that attracts cats and buttons in this delightful spatial puzzle.
cascadia: Create thriving Pacific Northwest habitats by drafting tiles and pairing them with wildlife.
harmonies: Build harmonious landscapes where animals and elements interact in colorful, peaceful patterns.
sky-team: Pilot and copilot must land the plane using dice — communicate only through actions, not words.
meadow: Wander through nature collecting memories and wildlife in a serene, contemplative journey.
flamecraft: Gather adorable dragons to help your shops flourish in a charming town of artisan magic.
my-city: Build your personal city across a 24-game legacy campaign — mistakes become permanent features.
cryptid: One clue each — deduce where the cryptid hides through logic and careful questioning of rivals.
deception-murder-in-hong-kong: A silent forensic scientist guides detectives to identify the killer among them through cryptic clues.
blood-on-the-clocktower: Even dead players influence this social deduction game of demonic deception and town chaos.
secret-hitler: Liberals vs. Fascists in a game of lies, accusations, and desperate trust decisions.
the-resistance-avalon: Find Merlin and the loyal servants while spies sabotage quests in this bluffing battle.
werewords: Guess the secret word while deducing which player is the werewolf feeding you false information.
a-fake-artist-goes-to-new-york: Everyone draws the same thing — except the fake artist who’s desperately improvising.
monikers: Describe, act out, and one-word clue ridiculous names across three hilarious rounds.
taboo: Get teammates to say the word without using the five obvious clues listed below it.
scattergories: Think fast and creative — list unique words starting with one letter across random categories.
apples-to-apples: Match noun cards to adjectives in this simple, silly comparison party game.
what-do-you-meme: Caption photos with outrageous phrases in this internet culture comedy competition.
cards-against-humanity: Fill in offensive blanks with horrible cards — the most inappropriate answer wins.
jenga: Carefully remove wooden blocks from a tower until someone makes it all come crashing down.
connect-four: Drop checkers to connect four in a row — simple rules hide surprising tactical depth.
boggle: Shake the grid and race to find words in a timed jumble of lettered dice.
bananagrams: Everyone builds their own crossword simultaneously — no turns, just frantic word-forming speed.
scrabble: Form high-scoring words on a crossword board using letter tiles and strategic placement.
trivial-pursuit: Answer trivia across six categories to fill your pie and prove your general knowledge mastery.
clue: Deduce who killed Mr. Boddy, with what weapon, and in which room through logic and luck.
monopoly: Buy properties, charge rent, and bankrupt opponents in this classic real estate trading game.
risk: Command armies and conquer territories in a globe-spanning battle for world domination.
chess: Command an army of pieces with unique moves in humanity’s timeless strategy masterpiece.
checkers: Jump opponent pieces and reach the far side to crown your kings in this classic game.
backgammon: Race your checkers home while blocking opponents in this ancient game of dice and tactics.
mahjong: Match beautiful tiles to form winning patterns in this traditional Chinese game of skill.
cribbage: Peg your way to 121 points through clever card combinations and strategic counting.
gin-rummy: Form melds and minimize deadwood to knock and win in this classic two-player card game.
uno: Match colors and numbers while deploying wild cards and skips to be first to empty your hand.
skip-bo: Build sequential stacks from your personal pile — first to empty it wins this wild race.
phase-10: Complete ten different card-collecting challenges before opponents finish theirs in this rummy variant.
ticket-to-ride-europe: Claim railway routes across Europe with tunnels, ferries, and station strategy twists.
ticket-to-ride-nordic: Connect Scandinavian cities in a tighter, more cutthroat take on the railway classic.
catan-seafarers: Expand Catan beyond the original island by building ships and discovering new territories to settle.
pandemic-hot-zone: Contain diseases threatening a single region in this streamlined, faster Pandemic experience.
codenames-duet: Two spies cooperate to identify all agents using one-word clues and careful deduction.
sushi-go: Draft adorable sushi cards for tasty scoring combos in this fast and charming card game.
love-letter-2019: Win the princess’s heart by delivering your letter using deduction and risky card plays.
the-mind: Play cards in ascending order without speaking — pure telepathy and timing synchronization required.
hanabi: Cooperatively build fireworks displays while only seeing everyone else’s cards, not your own.
point-salad: Draft vegetables and scoring cards to build the ultimate salad — simple, quick, and addictive.
no-thanks: Bid chips to avoid taking cards — sometimes the points you don’t take matter most.
take-5: Play numbered cards to avoid being the sixth in a row and taking penalty points.
scout: Play cards from your hand’s ends only — or scout opponents’ plays in this combo challenge.
cockroach-poker: Bluff about disgusting critters you’re passing to opponents — get caught four times and lose.
fox-in-the-forest: Win tricks but not too many in this clever two-player fairy tale card game.
hanamikoji: Win the favor of geishas through careful card play and agonizing strategic sacrifices.
lost-cities-card-game: Launch risky expeditions with ascending cards — invest early or play it safe for points?
schotten-totten: Form poker-style combinations to claim boundary stones in this intense two-player duel.
onitama: Outwit your opponent using martial arts move cards that shift between players each turn.
hive: Surround the enemy queen bee with your insect army in this chess-like game without a board.
azul-summer-pavilion: Draft colorful tiles to decorate a summer palace with symmetrical beauty and clever timing.
azul-stained-glass: Carefully select glass panes to create the most stunning cathedral window patterns possible.
splendor-duel: Collect gems and pearls to claim prestige in a head-to-head jewel market confrontation.
century-eastern-wonders: Sail island trade routes, build markets, and deliver exotic spices for profit and fame.
imhotep: Load stones onto boats sailing to monuments — but opponents decide where those boats dock.
ethnos: Recruit fantasy races and control kingdoms through clever hand management and timing your reveals.
quest-for-el-dorado: Deckbuild your way through the jungle, racing rivals to discover the legendary golden city.
downforce: Bid on cars, race them around a track, and bet on winners in this high-speed betting game.
flamme-rouge: Manage cyclist exhaustion and slipstream behind rivals in this tense Tour de France race.
jamaica: Pirate ships race around an island, battling and stealing treasure in this swashbuckling adventure.
celestia: Push your luck flying to cloud cities — bail early for safe points or risk crashing dramatically.
treasure-island: One player is Long John Silver, leaving cryptic clues while others race to dig up hidden treasure.
survive-escape-from-atlantis: Rescue your people from a sinking island while sea monsters and sharks hunt them down.
king-of-new-york: Giant monsters rampage through NYC, smashing buildings and battling for ultimate supremacy.
bunny-kingdom: Draft cards to expand your rabbit empire across a colorful map and build towering cities.
isle-of-cats: Draft polyomino cats to fill your boat — rescue the most valuable felines before evil arrives.
nidavellir: Bid coins to recruit dwarves and form tavern coalitions in this clever auction and drafting game.
its-a-wonderful-world: Draft cards and build an empire engine that snowballs into glorious production combos.
gizmos: Build a marble-powered research engine that triggers spectacular chains of scientific advancement.
space-base: Roll dice to activate ships in your tableau — benefit even on opponents’ turns in this engine builder.
cubitos: Race cube-pushing robots by upgrading your dice pool and unleashing powerful ability combinations.
quartz: Push your luck mining gems in unstable caverns — take too many crystals and lose everything.
libertalia-winds-of-galecrest: Draft and play pirate crew simultaneously, predicting rivals’ moves for treasure and glory.
forgotten-waters: Swashbuckling pirate stories with branching narratives, disasters, and ridiculous personality-driven chaos.
nemesis: Survive aboard an alien-infested ship where crewmates might have secret agendas and betrayals.
eclipse-second-dawn: Explore space, research technology, and wage epic fleet battles for galactic domination.
twilight-imperium-4: Negotiate, battle, and scheme your way to control the galaxy in this legendary space opera.
terra-mystica: Transform terrain and expand your asymmetric faction across a contested world of strategic depth.
gaia-project: Terraform planets and research alien technologies in this brain-burning space civilization puzzle.
feast-for-odin: Viking life simulation — raid, craft, farm, and hunt to fill your boards with prosperous goods.
le-havre: Build and use buildings to process resources into wealth in this economic engine masterpiece.
ora-et-labora: Monks pray, work, and build monasteries using resources and clever production chain management.
caverna: Dig mountain caves, raise animals, and farm fields in this open-ended dwarven sandbox adventure.
clans-of-caledonia: Trade whisky and cheese across Scotland while managing resources and expanding your clan’s reach.
barrage: Engineer massive dams and control water flow to power turbines in this ruthless resource war.
kanban-ev: Manage a car factory’s departments to impress Sandra, the demanding board administrator, with efficiency.
lisboa: Rebuild Lisbon after the devastating 1755 earthquake through politics, commerce, and careful planning.
the-gallerist: Discover artists, promote them, and sell masterpieces in the cutthroat contemporary art market.
anachrony: Time-traveling factions compete to save humanity while paradoxes threaten to unravel reality itself.
maracaibo: Sail the Caribbean, deliver goods, complete quests, and influence nations in this story-driven adventure.
dune-imperium: Combine deckbuilding and worker placement to control spice, forge alliances, and dominate Arrakis.
oath: Shape a kingdom’s chronicle across games where today’s victor becomes tomorrow’s established power.
sleeping-gods: Captain a steamship across a vast open world, making choices in a persistent narrative adventure.
